strategies.name: IVB_BREAKOUT_IMBALANCE_TRANSITION
strategies.description: PRIMARY FOCUS: Trading the transition from Balance to Imbalance
strategies.trigger: Price breaks the Initial Balance High (IBH) or Low (IBL) and seeks new liquidity.
strategies.confirmation: NEVER enter on the first break. Wait for ACCEPTANCE of volume and price outside the IB. You must see constant, sustained aggression (Big Trades and directional Delta) pushing the price into the new Imbalance zone. The counter-party must fail to push price back inside the IB.

strategies.name: VAH_REJECTION_SHORT_OR_VAL_REJECTION_LONG
strategies.trigger: Price tests the Value Area High (VAH) or Value Area Low (VAL).
strategies.confirmation: [CURRENTLY DEPRIORITIZED] Focus primary analysis on Imbalance transitions instead.

strategies.name: EXHAUSTION
strategies.trigger: Price rejection with intense opposite-side delta.
strategies.confirmation: [CURRENTLY DEPRIORITIZED] Focus primary analysis on Imbalance transitions instead.
